title: Write ferrum_extlib_draw_x11.md
description: CCSP lib_ccsp_draw_x11: legacy and embedded Linux display backend via Xlib+XRender. Not in Ferrum stdlib. Design extlib module: X11 window creation, XRender antialiased compositing, XShm shared memory for local display, Damage extension for partial repaints, use case: embedded systems without Wayland compositor, XWayland compatibility mode.
